title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 22–26, this part focuses on Unknown person #21, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Ever since I was a child

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I've had a habit of stealing food

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I don't blame you for Sus- pecting me

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: All we'll be left with is regrets!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll flip every last rock on this island to find some food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: So the bird spit it out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Just in the Nick of Time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Although it's not much, it should help.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aren't you the one that's going to eat it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You're the one that found it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry about me, you look like you're about to pass out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: You're the one who's dying, bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've done far less work than you have!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Also, I can do whatever I want!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
